name: Tons of Stats!
desc: Your team gains 8 Armor, 8 Magic Resist, 8% Attack Speed, 8 Ability Power, and 8 Attack Damage.

name: Cybernetic Uplink
desc: At the start of each planning phase, gain 1 gold. Your team gains 150 Health and 15 Attack Damage.

name: Buried Treasures
desc: Gain 6 random component items.

name: Pandora's Items
desc: Round Start: Randomize the items on your bench champions.

name: Lategame Specialist
desc: You don't lose HP from losing combat. At Stage 4, gain 25 gold.

name: Anomaly Augment
desc: Gain a unique Anomaly that permanently upgrades one of your champions.
